name: self-eval-quality
description: Tests that self-evaluation output is thorough and actionable

criteria.name: has_task_audit
criteria.description: Includes task audit with original request quoted
criteria.check: output contains Requested and Delivered sections

criteria.name: has_count_match
criteria.check: output contains count comparison with PASS or FAIL

criteria.name: has_scoring_table
criteria.description: Includes quality scoring table with all 5 dimensions
criteria.check: output contains Completeness, Correctness, Quality, Efficiency, Innovation scores

criteria.name: has_overall_score
criteria.check: output contains Overall score as weighted average

criteria.name: has_root_cause
criteria.description: For issues, includes root cause analysis
criteria.check: if score < 8, output contains why analysis

criteria.name: updates_memory
criteria.check: agent_performance_log.md is updated with new entry
